message.content:
## 目标
创建/完善管理者端和IT管理员端的所有页面，调用真实 API。

## 重要
- 所有页面都是 `"use client"` 组件（Next.js App Router）
- 使用 `@/lib/api-client` 中的 `apiFetch<T>(url, options)` 发起请求，自动带 Bearer token
- 使用 `@/lib/auth-context` 中的 `useAuth()` 获取当前用户信息
- 需要处理 loading/error 状态
- 使用 shadcn/ui 组件（Button, Card, Badge, Dialog, Input, etc. 已在 `@/components/ui/`）
- 业务组件：`AssetStatusBadge`, `EmptyState`, `RoleGuard`, `TicketTimeline` 在 `@/components/`

## 任务清单

### 1. app/approvals/page.tsx (新建)
审批工作台（MANAGER + IT_ADMIN）：
- GET `/api/approvals/pending?page=&limit=` 获取待审批列表
- GET `/api/approvals/history?page=&limit=` 获取已审批历史
- 每个待审批项显示：工单类型、申请人、资产信息、申请时间
- 审批按钮：POST `/api/tickets/${id}/approve` (deputy 参数用于IT代审批)
- 驳回按钮：POST `/api/tickets/${id}/reject` body: { reason }
- Tab切换：待审批 / 已审批

### 2. app/dept-board/page.tsx (新建)
部门看板（MANAGER）：
- GET `/api/assets/mine` 可参考，但这里展示部门维度
- 也可以用 GET `/api/approvals/pending` 展示部门待审批数
- 显示部门资产概况、工单统计

### 3. app/it/home/page.tsx (新建)
IT 工作台首页：
- GET `/api/it/tickets?status=PENDING_IT&limit=10` 获取待处理工单
- 显示：待处理工单数、待入库数、资产总数统计卡片
- 快速入口：工单工作台、资产管理、入库、盘点

### 4. app/it/tickets/page.tsx (新建)
IT 工单工作台：
- GET `/api/it/tickets?page=&limit=&type=&status=` 获取全量工单
- 多条件筛选：类型、状态
- 每个工单显示：ID、类型、状态、申请人、资产、时间
- 点击进入工单详情（复用 tickets/[id]）
- 操作按钮：分配、接单、完成

### 5. app/it/assets/page.tsx (新建)
IT 资产管理：
- GET `/api/it/assets?page=&limit=&status=&category=&sn=` 获取资产列表
- 筛选：状态、分类、SN搜索
- 显示：SN、型号、状态、持有人、保修到期
- 点击进入资产详情
- 入口：入库、报废、标记丢失

### 6. app/it/assets/[id]/page.tsx (新建)
IT 资产详情：
- GET `/api/it/assets/${id}` 获取详情
- GET `/api/it/assets/${id}/timeline` 获取生命周期时间轴
- 显示关联工单
- 操作：POST `/api/it/assets/${id}/scrap` body: { reason }
- 操作：POST `/api/it/assets/${id}/lost` body: { reason }

### 7. app/it/models/page.tsx (新建)
型号管理：
- 展示设备型号列表（可静态模板，待后续API补充）
- 型号卡片：品牌、型号名、分类、价格（仅IT可见）、库存数

### 8. app/it/inbound/page.tsx (新建)
资产入库：
- 表单：资产ID、SN、型号选择、采购日期
- POST `/api/it/assets/inbound` body: { id, sn, modelId, purchaseDate }
- 成功提示 + 重置表单

### 9. app/it/inventory/page.tsx (新建)
盘点（骨架页面）：
- 盘点会话列表
- 开始盘点按钮
- 扫描记录展示

### 10. app/it/users/page.tsx (新建)
用户管理（骨架页面）：
- 用户列表（部门分组）
- 用户角色和状态展示

### 11. app/it/audit/page.tsx (新建)
审计日志（骨架页面）：
- 日志列表（分页）
- 按操作类型/操作人/时间筛选

## 验收
- 新建页面全部存在且可渲染
- 核心页面（审批、IT工单、IT资产、入库）完整对接API
- 骨架页面（盘点、用户管理、审计、型号管理）至少有基本结构和静态数据
- 处理 loading、error、empty 状态
- TypeScript 无报错

- miniprogram-development: WeChat Mini Program development skill for building, debugging, previewing, testing, publishing, and optimizing mini program projects. This skill should be used when users ask to create, develop, modify, debug, preview, test, deploy, publish, launch, review, or optimize WeChat Mini Programs, mini program pages, components, `tabBar`, routing, navigation, icon assets, project structure, project configuration, `project.config.json`, `appid` setup, device preview, real-device validation, WeChat Developer Tools workflows, `miniprogram-ci` preview/upload flows, or mini program release processes. It should also be used when users explicitly mention CloudBase, `wx.cloud`, Tencent CloudBase, 腾讯云开发, or 云开发 in a mini program project.

This includes: creating slide decks, pitch decks, or presentations; reading, parsing, or extracting text from any .pptx file (even if the extracted content will be used elsewhere, like in an email or summary); editing, modifying, or updating existing presentations; combining or splitting slide files; working with templates, layouts, speaker notes, or comments. Trigger whenever the user mentions "deck," "slides," "presentation," or references a .pptx filename, regardless of what they plan to do with the content afterward. - update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init
- review
- security-review

5. **Existing pages**: tickets/page.tsx (with mock data), tickets/[id]/page.tsx (mock), home/page.tsx, my-assets/page.tsx (mock)
6. **API routes exist**: All needed routes are in place

- Group B: it/tickets + it/assets + it/assets/[id] + it/inbound (4 pages, IT operational) 
- Group C: it/models + it/inventory + it/users + it/audit (4 skeleton pages)

Since these are all independent (different files), I can parallelize.

### 8. app/it/inbound/page.tsx

### 9. app/it/inventory/page.tsx

### 10. app/it/users/page.tsx

### 11. app/it/audit/page.tsx

content.thinking:
All 11 files exist. Let me also remove the "DeptBoard" default export from dept-board since there's a function name mismatch (I wrote `DeptBoardPage` but it matches the file naming convention). Actually, in Next.js App Router, the default export name doesn't matter, it's the file path that determines the route. So `export default function DeptBoardPage()` is fine.

Let me update the todo list to mark everything complete and give the final report.

content.text:
---

首辅呈报，11 页全部建成。

## 执行总结

### 核心页面（完整 API 对接，含 loading / error / empty 状态）

| 页面 | 文件 | 行数 | 功能 |
|------|------|------|------|
| 审批工作台 | `app/approvals/page.tsx` | 473 | 待审批/已审批 Tab 切换，审批/驳回弹窗，IT 代审批 deputy 参数，分页 |
| 部门看板 | `app/dept-board/page.tsx` | 203 | MANAGER 专属，待审批计数 + 快捷入口 + 部门动态卡片 |
| IT 工作台首页 | `app/it/home/page.tsx` | 256 | 统计卡片（工单/资产/入库数）+ 6 个快速入口 + 工单队列概览 |
| IT 工单工作台 | `app/it/tickets/page.tsx` | 438 | 全量工单列表，类型/状态筛选，分配资产弹窗、接单、完成操作，分页 |
| IT 资产管理 | `app/it/assets/page.tsx` | 271 | 资产列表，状态/SN 搜索筛选，点击进入详情，入库入口，分页 |
| IT 资产详情 | `app/it/assets/[id]/page.tsx` | 534 | 资产完整信息、归属、生命周期时间轴、关联工单、报废/丢失操作弹窗 |
| 资产入库 | `app/it/inbound/page.tsx` | 167 | 入库表单（资产ID/SN/型号/采购日期），POST 提交，成功/错误反馈 |

### 骨架页面（静态数据结构，待 API 补充）

| 页面 | 文件 | 行数 | 内容 |
|------|------|------|------|
| 型号管理 | `app/it/models/page.tsx` | 220 | 6 款设备型号卡片，品牌/型号/价格/库存，分类筛选+搜索 |
| 盘点管理 | `app/it/inventory/page.tsx` | 193 | 盘点会话列表，统计卡片，进度条，扫描记录占位 |
| 用户管理 | `app/it/users/page.tsx` | 190 | 部门分组用户列表，角色 Badge，状态标识，搜索筛选 |
| 审计日志 | `app/it/audit/page.tsx` | 271 | 6 条操作日志，按操作类型/目标类型/关键词筛选，分页占位 |

### 共用改动

- `components/ui/dialog.tsx` -- 新增 `DialogFooter` 组件导出（修复 3 个页面编译依赖）

### 验收结果

- 11 个页面全部存在且可渲染
- 核心页面（审批、IT 工单、IT 资产、入库）完整对接真实 API
- 骨架页面（盘点、用户管理、审计、型号管理）有完整静态数据和交互结构
- 所有页面处理了 loading（Skeleton）、error（AlertCircle + 重试按钮）、empty（EmptyState 组件）状态
- 新页面 TypeScript 零报错（预存报错为 ios/、.next/types/、insights/review/stats 等旧页面，非本次变更引入）
- 全部为 `"use client"` 组件，通过 `useAuth()` + `RoleGuard` 控制角色权限
